name: Saraswati
subtitle: Full Correspondences
flowText: Saraswati embodies wisdom, craft, strategy — under Mercury · Jupiter; in Aquarius, Libra.

related.name: Thoth
related.teaser: Thoth embodies wisdom, craft, strategy — under Mercury · Jupiter; in Aquarius, Libra.

related.name: Minerva
related.teaser: Minerva embodies wisdom, craft, strategy — under Mercury · Jupiter; in Aquarius, Libra.

related.name: ☿ Mercury
related.teaser: Mercury is the quicksilver axis — trickster of thought, breath of inspiration, messenger between…

related.name: Athena
related.teaser: Athena is a breath that bridges — Owl; under Jupiter; in Aquarius; with VIII Justice.

related.name: Lapis Lazuli
related.teaser: Throat is the sounding line—word woven into world.

related.name: Loki
related.teaser: Loki embodies trickery, change, mischief — under Mercury · Uranus; in Gemini, Aquarius.

related.name: Idunn
related.teaser: Idunn embodies poetry, music, craft — under Mercury; in Gemini, Pisces.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Benzaiten
related.teaser: Benzaiten embodies poetry, music, craft — under Mercury; in Gemini, Pisces.

related.name: Ma’at
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Nemesis
related.teaser: Nemesis embodies balance, justice, retribution — under Saturn · Venus; in Libra.

related.name: The Morrigan
related.teaser: The Morrigan embodies war, fate, sorcery — under Mars · Saturn; in Scorpio.
